name: VkBlendOverlapEXT
description: الوصف الرسمي: Enumerant specifying the blend overlap parameter.
usage: الوصف الرسمي لهذا التعداد: Enumerant specifying the blend overlap parameter.

The weighting functions p 0 , p 1 , and p 2 هي defined in table Advanced Blend Overlap Modes. In these functions, the A components of the source and destination colors هي taken to indicate the portion of the pixel covered by the fragment (source) and the fragments previously accumulated in the pixel (destination). The functions p 0 , p 1 , and p 2 approximate the relative portion of the pixel covered by the intersection of the source and destination, covered only by the source, and covered only by the destination, respectively.
توضح القيم المعرفة داخل VkBlendOverlapEXT السلوك الفعلي الذي سيُقرأ من الحقل أو البنية أو الدالة التي تستقبل هذا التعداد.
notes: تظهر بعض القيم في هذا التعداد عبر الامتدادات التالية: VK_EXT_blend_operation_advanced.
